bridge_equation_v45.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v45 = mix(B_plastic_v44, L_sys_field_fabric, 1 - P_sys_field_fabric, D_feature_v39, 1 - G_brain_v39)
bridge_equation_v45.structure_term: B_struct_v45 = mix(B_struct_v44, S_sys_field_fabric, R_sys_field_fabric, 1 - P_sys_field_fabric, D_structure_v39)
bridge_equation_v45.readiness_term: R_train_v45 = mix(R_train_v44, B_plastic_v45, B_struct_v45, R_sys_field_fabric, D_align_v39, 1 - P_sys_field_fabric)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v45 checks whether systemic low-risk field fabric begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more interlocked fabric-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this fabric-like low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
